node.text: To help meet soaring energy demand, India is growing liquefied natural gas (LNG) in its energy mix. Join us on a journey to Shell’s Hazira terminal to see how LNG is powering lives and economic progress: https://go.shell.com/4kG0adQ

Liquefied natural gas (or LNG) is helping to power lives around the world. Join us on a journey to Shell’s Hazira terminal to see how we are providing India with LNG for energy security. Discover more: https://go.shell.com/4t628rU

node.text: Discover how Shell delivers natural gas to customers worldwide – from pipeline and LNG imports to tailored energy solutions. For the full journey, visit: https://go.shell.com/3MMBbbX

This year, Shell continued to do what it has done for more than a century: help safely deliver the energy the world relies on to move, work and grow. Discover some of the stories bringing to life the people, projects and innovations helping make this possible: https://go.shell.com/3YuuaPu

node.text: Energy security and affordability are key to a balanced energy transition.  Hear Shell’s CEO Wael Sawan share his perspective in the season finale of The Energy Podcast. Listen or watch now. https://go.shell.com/3MrBEQD

node.text: Liquefied natural gas (LNG) is helping to meet India’s surging energy demand, fuelling industry and offering a lower-carbon alternative to coal. Join us on a journey from London to Delhi, Gujarat and Mumbai to see how LNG is powering lives and economic progress. Discover more: https://go.shell.com/4potZRy

node.text: Oil remains a fundamental part of our daily lives — powering not just transport, but manufacturing and modern living. 🎙️ Peter Costello, Shell’s President of Upstream, joins The Energy Podcast to explore the evolving role of oil in the energy mix, growing energy demand, and the need to continue investing in its production to help provide the energy the world needs today. 🔗 Watch the full episode: https://go.shell.com/3LL2nr9

Deep beneath the sea, innovation is at work. Fredrik and the Shell engineering team worked with partners to develop the world’s deepest subsea compression system at Norway’s Ormen Lange gas field. With this innovation, the additional gas recovered could help heat 5 million European homes next year. Read more: https://go.shell.com/4r3dQm4

node.text:
🎙️ The Energy Podcast drops anchor in the world of shipping, unpacking its vital role in the global energy system and the steps the industry is taking to decarbonise. Tune in, wherever you get your podcasts
https://go.shell.com/4o9fJLM

AI is booming — along with demand for the energy to power it. Discover how Shell’s innovative cooling technology is reducing energy use in data centres. For the full story, visit https://go.shell.com/48dTcc1

node.text:
There are more than 1.3 billion cars on the road today… so how can the world keep driving while reducing emissions at the same time? The Energy Podcast unpacks the complexity behind decarbonising road transport.
 
Episode guests:
🎙️Dr. Thomas Becker, Vice President for Government Affairs and Sustainability, @bmwgroup 
🎙️Patrick Carré, Senior Vice President for Mobility and Convenience, @shell

Listen or watch: https://go.shell.com/3IqCnzP

node.text:
Into the deep. With partners, we have developed a ground-breaking technology that is transforming gas production in the Norwegian Sea. Engineered to withstand deep-sea pressure and freezing temperatures, the project could unlock enough additional gas to heat up to 5 million European homes next year.  go.shell.com/3JBA90J

 #PoweringProgress
A new frontier in global gas supply. See how LNG Canada is helping to meet the world’s growing demand for a critical fuel in the energy transition. Read more: go.shell.com/lngc

node.text: 🎙️ Is carbon capture and storage (CCS) ready to step up in the energy transition? In the latest episode of The Energy Podcast, we explore how CCS works, why it matters and the challenges of scaling the technology globally. Listen now. https://go.shell.com/4oEjA4z #CCS #carboncapture #ccus #engineering #PoweringProgress

node.text:
Discover how natural gas is extracted at Shell’s Groundbirch facility in Canada, at the start of the global journey of liquefied natural gas (LNG). 

For the full journey, visit https://go.shell.com/45oU6iu #PoweringProgress #lng #naturalgas

node.text:
🎙️By helping provide energy security, displace coal and support renewable power generation, liquefied natural gas, or LNG, is playing an important role in the energy transition, but is also not without its critics. 

Shell's President of Integrated Gas, Cederic Cremers, joins The Energy Podcast to talk all things LNG. Listen now.  https://go.shell.com/44jjvuU

Today on International Women in Engineering Day, we recognise the progress made and the work still ahead to support and empower women in engineering.

“International Women in Engineering Day is a great reminder that while we have come a long way with women in our field, we must continue to inspire and empower the next generation of women in engineering.” – Laura, Environmental Engineer.

Read more about how skilled engineers are delivering value for Shell in the US:  https://go.shell.com/platformsforchange

node.text:
Whale is our most efficient platform in the US Gulf of America, to date. By closely replicating the design of its predecessor, Vito, we have reduced costs and achieved a 30% reduction in carbon intensity over the platform's lifespan. See how we are delivering secure supplies of energy with lower emissions: go.shell.com/44vSt2r

#PoweringProgress

node.text:
🎙️ How is the world’s energy system evolving – and where? What’s driving the pace of progress – and holding it back? And what’s Shell’s role in all of that? 
 
Kicking off a new series of The Energy Podcast, Peter Wood, Shell’s Chief Energy Advisor, discusses where we are in the global transition from fossil fuels to low-carbon energy. https://go.shell.com/4kREYk2

🎙️ Coming soon: a new season of The Energy Podcast from Shell!

Join industry experts as they discuss the big topics in energy, from liquefied natural gas, to artificial intelligence, to carbon capture and storage. 

New episodes drop every two weeks starting June 10, 2025. Subscribe wherever you get your podcasts. go.shell.com/4mHDquz
#PoweringProgress
Power. Transport. Industry. LNG, or liquefied natural gas, is helping fuel key sectors of the economy from India to China to the UK. Slide to explore how. More: go.shell.com/lngworld #lng

node.text:
75 years and counting! 
An iconic partnership since @shellmotorsport and @scuderiaferrari first raced together on May 21st 1950!

For 75 years, Shell and @ScuderiaFerrari have shared a commitment to technical innovation and performance. From 2026, our partnership enters a new phase with the development and supply of an advanced sustainable Formula 1 race fuel. #MonacoGP #F1 #Formula1 @shellmotorsport https://go.shell.com/4mqhALT

node.text: Making high-quality products, with lower emissions. Our colleague Amu explains how we have electrified our Wesseling facility in Germany, helping to cut scope 1 and 2 emissions from our operations by 2030.  Read more: go.shell.com/climatetargets #PoweringProgress

node.text: From cruise ships to CO2 carriers, liquefied natural gas, or LNG, is helping to power more vessels around the world. Shell delivered a record amount of marine LNG last year. This can help lower emissions now and offers a possible pathway to net zero. For more, visit: go.shell.com/4jz8NVK

node.text: Whale is our first deep-water platform in the US Gulf of America to be started remotely. Most of its operations can be managed from a control room in New Orleans, helping to reduce risks, enhance safety, and lower emissions over the platform’s lifespan. Find out more: go.shell.com/whale #PoweringProgress

node.text: Introducing the Northern Lights transport and storage project in Norway, designed to transport CO2 from industrial sites across Europe for safe and permanent storage in a reservoir 2.6km under the seabed. Find out more: https://go.shell.com/ccs

On the coast of Norway, Shell has been working with @equinor and @totalenergies to develop the world’s first open-source CO2 transport and storage infrastructure: the Northern Lights project. The project is designed to transport captured CO2 from across Europe and permanently store it under the Norwegian seabed. We are now investing in the second phase of Northern Lights, aiming to more than triple the current CO2 injection capacity at the facility.

Carbon capture and storage offers a way to help reduce emissions from industries that are hard to decarbonise. Learn more: go.shell.com/ccs

Despite progress, women still account for a small fraction of roles onboard oil and gas platforms – a sign of the opportunity for greater representation of women in this industry. Their experiences can vary too. 
 
We are working hard to make sure everybody across our assets feels valued, respected, and a strong sense of belonging. Two skilled engineers helping deliver value for Shell in the Gulf of America – together with the first woman to work offshore for Shell in the USA – share their unique perspectives of life at sea. 
Read now: go.shell.com/iwd

#internationalwomensday
Cooled. Condensed. Shipped. Shell’s integrated liquefied natural gas (LNG) business is helping to meet demand for secure, reliable energy. But what exactly is LNG? Slide to learn more. shell.com/lng

node.text:
In a control room in New Orleans, the Shell team started up the Whale platform in the Gulf of America. With just 60 people on board and a simplified design, Whale is reducing costs and emissions. 
https://go.shell.com/whale #PoweringProgress

Powering homes and businesses⚡️. We have started production at Penguins, a next-generation facility in the UK. More efficient than its predecessor, Penguins will deliver secure energy from one of the North Sea’s most iconic oil and gas fields. 

The project has involved thousands of people, from construction in China and commissioning in Norway to operations in the UK. 

https://go.shell.com/3WPvRqe
#PoweringProgress

node.text:
Introducing Whale, our latest and most efficient platform in the USA. Whale is modelled on our prototype platform, Vito, and incorporates remote-control technology, reducing costs and emissions over its lifespan. 

https://go.shell.com/42LpxUx
#PoweringProgress

Shell has been working with @Equinor and @TotalEnergies on a carbon capture and storage project called Northern Lights that will transport captured CO2 from across Europe, and permanently store it under the seabed off the coast of Norway. Carbon capture and storage offers a way to reduce emissions from industries that are hard to decarbonise. For more on #CCS visit shell.com/ccs

node.text:
As Gastech 2024 gets under way, we are joining other businesses, innovators, and policymakers to discuss the challenge of meeting energy demand while transitioning to a low-carbon energy system, including the vital role of liquefied natural gas.
Read more: shell.com/lng
Disclaimer: shell.com/disclaimer

🌿 Nature Energy, owned by Shell, produces biomethane using organic waste. The biofuel can help to lower emissions from transport.

Discover how we are providing energy while helping to build the energy system of tomorrow: shell.com/energytransition #poweringprogress #biofuel #biofuels

node.text:
From electric vehicle charging to biofuels, renewable power to hydrogen, Shell is making significant investments in the energy transition.

See how we are providing energy today, while helping to build the low-carbon energy system of tomorrow. #PoweringProgress https://go.shell.com/3VvFsTl

node.text:
Ahead of International Women’s Day we asked colleagues across Shell what it takes to build an inclusive culture. In 1997, just 4% of senior leaders at Shell were women. Today we’re working to reach or exceed 40% by 2030. 

That’s important progress, but our aim to become one of the most diverse and inclusive organisations in the world relies on everyone to step up – and to show care, courage and curiosity in the moments that matter. 
 
Read about Shell’s work to support gender equality: https://www.shell.com/gender
 
#IWD #IWD2024 #InternationalWomensDay #PoweringProgress

⚡ CrossWind, our joint venture with @eneco, has started operations at Hollandse Kust Noord, a new wind farm off the Dutch coast.

The subsidy-free wind park is expected to produce renewable electricity -- about 2.8% of electricity demand in the Netherlands. #PoweringProgress More: https://go.shell.com/4aReDyr

node.text:
Meet Timi, our first gas platform in Malaysia designed to run on renewable energy. The platform uses energy from solar panels and wind turbines to power the production of gas. Batteries store excess solar energy to keep the unmanned platform running at night. Gas from Timi will be used to help power Malaysia’s economic growth.
 
Find out how we are delivering secure energy today on our journey to net zero. 

#PoweringProgress 

https://www.shell.com/powering-progress/powering-progress-in-action.html

Charging up day and night. ⚡️ We opened our largest Shell Recharge electric vehicle charging station in the world in Shenzhen, China. The station features 258 public fast-charging points and is operated by a joint venture between Shell and @byd_global. #PoweringProgress #EV #electricvehicle #EVcharging

node.text: We opened our largest electric vehicle charging station in the world in Shenzhen, China. The station features 258 public fast-charging points and is operated by a joint venture between Shell and @byd_global. This is one of the ways we are delivering secure energy today on our journey to net zero. #PoweringProgress #EV #electricvehicles #EVcharging

node.text: Together with @keepcalmlovepenguins, Shell Singapore has launched its first fully-electric ferry – a first for Shell globally! Three 200-seater commuter ferries will transport around 3,000 Shell personnel and visitors daily between mainland Singapore and the Shell Energy and Chemicals Park Singapore. The ferry first made waves in July 2023. More on https://go.shell.com/47WiCbA

node.text: At Shell, we made progress on our journey to net zero, cutting carbon emissions from our operations by 30% by the end of 2022, compared with 2016 on a net basis. #PoweringProgress More: shell.com/energytransition

node.text: By listening, learning and reflecting on each other’s experiences, we can each take action to contribute to a more inclusive world. We asked Shell colleagues around the world to share their inspiring stories. This is Aps’ 💛 Read more: shell.com/gender #InternationalWomensDay #IWD2023 #IWD

node.text: Powering lives with secure energy ⚡️ Production has begun at Vito, our newest offshore platform in the US Gulf of Mexico. #PoweringProgress http://spr.ly/60483ocXs

⚡ It’s been one year since @Shell and @ScottishPowerHQ won bids to develop two large floating wind farms in the UK. Once built, the projects could have a total generation capacity of around 5 GW, enough to power the equivalent of 6 million homes. This is more than double the number of homes in Scotland today. More about our wind projects: shell.com/wind #PoweringProgress #wind

node.text: Meet the new Shell CEO Wael Sawan. As he steps into his new role as Chief Executive Officer, he will be working to deliver the energy the world needs today while helping to build the energy system of tomorrow. #PoweringProgress https://go.shell.com/3WQZIfW

node.text: Together with @Eneco, we will build a new offshore wind farm in the Netherlands ⚡️ The project will have installed capacity of 760 MW. That’s enough to decarbonise about 3% of the current Dutch electricity demand. http://go.shell.com/3FQz2EO  #PoweringProgress #wind #energytransition

node.text: Steel has helped build our modern world. But producing it generates around 7% of global CO2 emissions. See how we are using solar power to help cut carbon emissions from steel. #PoweringProgress #steel #decarbonization

node.text: Cement is all around us, but producing it generates around 7% of global CO2 emissions. Visit the link in our bio to see how we are working with our customers and others to cut help carbon from industry. #PoweringProgress #energytransition #cement
This is Shell’s first UK forecourt fully dedicated to electric vehicle (EV) charging ⚡️ The #ShellRecharge EV charging hub features nine high-powered 175 kW charge points. #PoweringProgress

⚡️ We have renewed our partnership with @nissanedams in @fiaformulae. Together we hope to take the innovations from the racetrack to the road, allowing electric vehicle users to benefit from improved efficiency and a better driving experience. @shellmotorsport #EV #formulae

⚡️ Shell has started up Europe’s largest hydrogen electrolyser of its kind at our Energy and Chemicals Park Rheinland, in Germany. Part of the #REFHYNE consortium and with funding from the EU Commission, the electrolyser uses renewable energy to produce green hydrogen.

The green hydrogen will be used to produce fuels with lower-carbon intensity and to help to decarbonise other sectors such as heavy industry, aviation and road transport.

Visit the link in our bio to read how #hydrogen is taking centre stage.

Innovating on and off the track 🏎️ Shell and @ScuderiaFerrari have renewed their long-standing partnership. As part of this new chapter, Shell will keep providing the iconic motorsport team with fuels and lubricants and we will help them to reduce their carbon footprint. #formula1 #racing #f1 #ferrari @shellmotorsport

Powering Progress ⚡ From today ERM Power is known as Shell Energy Australia – the country’s largest dedicated supplier of #electricity to businesses. This is just one of our operations –  the Oakey Power Station in Queensland. #energytransition

⚡️ Expanding our electric vehicle charging network. Shell has signed an agreement to acquire @ubitricity, a leading #EV on-street charging provider, in its latest step to support drivers making the switch to lower-carbon transport. 

Founded in Berlin, Germany, ubitricity operates in a number of European countries, and is the largest public EV charging network in the UK with over 2,700 charge points. #electricvehicle #evcharging

💛 From Malaysia to the UK, the teams working at Shell stations around the world worked hard to help customers during these difficult times. As lockdowns came into force across the world, our service champions found what customers wanted to buy changed and they had new roles to play ⛽️ Visit the link in our bio to see how #covid19 changed the way they work. #malaysia #uk #retail

While some were working from home 🏠 they were living at work 🏢 For more than 50 days, around 60 volunteers lived at the Shell Technology Centre in Bangalore, India, to make sure it could restart after the #COVID19 lockdown. In normal times, the technology centre hosts research in advanced biofuels, 3D geological modelling, enhanced computational research and more. During the country’s lockdown, nearly all research work was on hold. The team living on site needed to maintain gas and chemical systems, a 66 kilowatt substation and complex lab equipment that couldn’t be powered down. For more, visit the link in our bio. #coronavirus #lockdown #India #Bangalore #lab

🌴 Changing tropical landscape 🏥 Shell has contributed to the construction of a field hospital in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, to assist in the treatment of critical COVID-19 patients, in partnership with the Brazilian Petroleum Institute and Rede D’Or. The new facility, located in the south zone of the city, is equipped with 200 beds, including 100 intensive care units. See link in bio for more on our global response to #COVID19 💛 #riodejaneiro #brazil #coronavirus #oriotemessaenergia #021 #errejota

🏭 🛠️ We’ve diverted resources to make isopropyl alcohol at the Shell Pernis refinery in the Netherlands, and donated 2.5 million litres to the Dutch health-care sector. Work continues at the manufacturing plant, with new safety procedures in place. Apart from making fuels that keep people moving, Shell Pernis also makes raw materials for cleaning solvents, disinfectants and other essential products needed to fight the #coronavirus. For more on our response to #COVID19, see link in bio.

Helping communities on the front lines 💛 Shell is donating $3 million to @mercycorps_europe Resilience Fund to support the fight against #COVID19. Shell and Mercy Corps have been supporting communities together for many years. The partnership can now help protect some of the world's more vulnerable people from the impact of the pandemic, both during the immediate crisis and in the long term.

We estimate that Shell’s total contribution during the pandemic, including donations of funds, products, equipment and services, so far amounts to more than $30 million. To find out more see the link in our bio.

A trip to the upside down? 👨‍🚀 In fact, just another day during the maintenance work at the Shell Pernis refinery in the Netherlands. These tanks are as high as a three-storey building and can fit up to 10,450 cubic metres of product – that’s is the equivalent volume of four Olympic swimming pools. #pernis #netherlands #thenetherlands

🌳 1 million trees 🌳 over 5 years
Together with @forestryandlandscot we're planting one million trees in Scotland, as part of our nature-based solutions initiatives. The partnership will create new woodland, helping the Sottish local ecosystem and forests. Starting from October, drivers that fill up at Shell can also go carbon neutral at 1,000 stations no extra cost.

We're investing in nature as part of our broad drive to reduce CO2 emissions. #nature #trees #reforestation #climatechange

Ingenuity and innovation 👷‍♀️👷 Meet some of our team that combined cutting-edge technology, engineering excellence and a lot of hard work to complete the Brent Bravo lift. The iconic platform left the heart of North Sea for recycling after four decades producing oil and gas for European homes and businesses. #NorthSea #Brent #Bravo #engineering #engineeringlife

⚖️ 25,000 tonnes ⏱️ lifted in just 9 seconds. Earlier this year we said farewell to the Brent Bravo platform. The North Sea giant is being decommissioned after four decades of producing oil and gas to power European homes and businesses. Discover more in our Stories. #Brent #NorthSea #engineering #Bravo

🚗 Speed 🏆 Skill ⚡Energy efficiency... Throwback to the #ShellEcoMarathon Drivers’ World Championship! Shout out to the winners from @greenteamtwente, @timupsinsa and @dturoadrunners #MakeTheFuture #cars #efficiency #race #competition

Switching on the gas ⚡ Striking view of our new liquefied natural gas terminal in Gibraltar. The new facility is powering homes and businesses with natural gas, reducing emissions and improving air quality around the Rock of Gibraltar. #natgas #naturalgas #LNG #Gibraltar

Race ready! 😎 Back in Malaysia 🇲🇾 for the first time since 2013, #ShellEcoMarathon Asia teams took over @sepangcircuit to put their energy-efficient cars to the test! 🚗 A new record for Hydrogen Fuel Cell was set by the UrbanConcept team Nanyang E Drive, from Nanyang Technological University achieving 93.9km/m3. 🙌 The team were also victorious in the Drivers' World Championship qualifier, and will head to the Grand Final in London. #MakeTheFuture #Malaysia #stem #racing #cars #engineering

1,000+ young engineers. 108 ultra-energy-efficient vehicles. 18 countries from Asia and beyond.  #ShellEcoMarathon comes back to #Malaysia and the @Sepangcircuit where student teams put their energy-efficient cars to the test #MakeTheFuture #engineering #stem #racing #cars

More trees? 🌲 Together with @landlifecompany, we're planting over 300,000 trees until the end of 2019 in the region of Castilla y León in Spain. 
This initiative is part of our nature-based solutions programme. Nature can play a vital role in tackling climate change. So Shell is investing in nature as part of our broad drive to reduce CO2 emissions. #nature #trees #landlife #reforestation

🌳 5 million trees 🌳 over 12 years. Together with @staatsbosbeheer we're planting millions of trees in the Netherlands, as part of our nature-based solutions efforts. Nature can play a big role in the fight against climate change. So we are now investing in nature as part of our broad drive to tackle CO2 emissions. #nature #forest #bos #planten #netherlands

Officially hitting the track! 🏎 92 student teams from across the Americas 🌎 are ready to face the ultimate energy efficiency challenge. #ShellEcoMarathon #MakeTheFuture 💡 #engineering #stem #cars #racing

Scaling new heights! 👷 This maintenance crew member works on a turbine hub 81 metres up at our onshore Mount Storm wind farm in West Virginia. Shell is now also entering offshore wind generation in the USA, where our joint ventures intend to develop wind farms off New Jersey and Massachusetts ⚡ Another example of how we’re building our renewable power business. #renewableenergy #windfarm #windmill #windturbine #wind

#Engineering marvel in the heart of the North Sea 💛 Shell's Shearwater platform sits 225 km off Scotland and was built to resist 23-metre waves. 🌊 #ONS2018 #northsea #uk #engineeringlife #engineeringmarvel

Racing in style! 😎 #shellecomarathon is taking over @noordinarypark with young engineers trying to break efficiency records. And looking pretty cool at the same time. #makethefuture #womeninSTEM #engineering #engineeringlife #womeninengineering #racing #London

Bon appétit! 🍝 This might seem like a pasta maker, but look closer. Every day more than 20 researchers at the Shell Technology Centre #Amsterdam search for the perfect catalyst recipe, using these “pasta machines” to test them. 🔬 Catalyst components, which are around the size of a grain of rice, speed up chemical reactions, helping our refineries produce cleaner and more efficient energy products. #innovation #technology #engineering #stem #science #chemistry #makethefuture #engineeringlife

Bon voyage! 👋 Appomattox – our biggest deep-water platform in the Gulf of Mexico – has left Texas, USA, and is sailing to its final location. 🇺🇸 🔜 🏠 A true engineering marvel! #engineering #engineeringlife #deepwater #stem #gulfofmexico #makethefuture

Fierce focus... before hitting the #shellecomarathon track. 🖤 The ultra-energy-efficiency competition took over @racesonoma this weekend with 100 teams from nine countries across the Americas. 🚗 #makethefuture #california #race #driver #energyefficient #engineering #womeninengineering #stem #girlpower
Start your engines, #California! ☀️ The #shellecomarathon teams are getting ready to break energy efficiency records at @racesonoma! 💛 #makethefuture

node.text: 120 teams 🚗 18 countries 🏁 1 dream 🏆 #shellecomarathon comes back to Singapore bringing together young engineers from Asia and beyond to break energy efficiency records. #makethefuture #singapore #engineering #womeninengineering @shell_ecomarathon

It looks like the inside of a spaceship... but this photo was taken from inside a distillation tower at Shell Pernis — Europe’s largest refinery in the #Netherlands. 🇳🇱 At full capacity the site can refine 750 litres of oil per second. Technicians recently inspected and cleaned 12 units that keep the refinery running smoothly. This process took 700,000 man-hours! 🛠️ #engineering #technology #makethefuture #rotterdam

Feeling dizzy? 🙃 This is a drone’s eye view of our Mount Storm #wind farm in West Virginia, USA. Tip-to-tip, the total diameter of the blades stretches to around 80 metres (262 feet) - the wingspan of an Airbus A380. In a year, technicians inspecting its blades will climb on average around 25,000 meters (77,000 feet) of ladder. Shell first entered the onshore wind business in 2001. 🇺🇸 #renewableenergy #windfarm #windmill

Though it may seem extra-terrestrial, it’s an everyday instrument in the analytical department of Shell Technology Centre #Amsterdam, the Netherlands 🇳🇱 Shell scientists use this state-of-the-art technique, called “electron spectroscopy”, to research the properties of materials at a molecular level – an important part of our research in to advanced fuels and lubricants. 🔬 #innovation #technology #engineering #stem #science #chemistry #makethefuture

Engineering power 🛠️ A young French engineer from La Joliverie-Polytech Nantes works on the ultra-efficient Shell Eco-marathon hydrogen car in Italy. #shellecomarathon #makethefuture #ferrari #scuderiaferrari #cars #racing #motorsports #italy #fiorano #engineering #stem #mechanicalengineering #innovation #hydrogen #technology

That defining moment before hitting the track 💙 We brought the Shell Eco-marathon Drivers' World Champions to the iconic Fiorano circuit this week, putting their ultra-efficient cars to the test. #shellecomarathon #makethefuture #ferrari #scuderiaferrari #cars #racing #motorsports #italy #fiorano #hydrogen #h2mobility #womeninengineering #engineering #innovation #technology #stem #maranello #renewableenergy

Cars of the future spotted in Fiorano! 🚗 Young French engineers from La Joliverie-Polytech Nantes drive their Shell Eco-marathon hydrogen car on the legendary circuit. #shellecomarathon #makethefuture #ferrari #scuderiaferrari #cars #racing #motorsports #italy #fiorano #hydrogen #h2mobility #stem #engineering #engineeringlife #renewableenergy #maranello

Champion 🏆 From a school in Minnesota to the iconic Fiorano circuit in Italy, Saint Thomas Academy had a once-in-a-lifetime experience this week with @scuderiaferrari after winning the Shell Eco-marathon Drivers' World Championship 2017. @allthingssta 
#shellecomarathon #makethefuture #ferrari #scuderiaferrari #cars #racing #motorsports #italy #fiorano #stem #engineering #engineeringlife #minnesota #renewableenergy #electricvehicle #EV #technology #innovation

Howdy, Appomattox! 👏 The deep-water project’s hull arrives at Ingleside, #Texas, where construction of the platform will be completed. Once installed, the facility will weigh in at approximately 125,000 metric tons. That's more than the largest US naval aircraft carrier! #makethefuture #technology #engineering

Working non-stop! 👷‍♀️ Shell Transportation & Installation Project Engineer Jillian Hansen was in charge of planning the safe loading, transport, and offloading of the Appomattox hull in #Texas. Every day, throughout the two-month journey, she monitored updates on weather, wind and wave and more. Go Jillian! #makethefuture #technology #engineering #womeninengineering
